title: Add course lesson selection to study plan
description: Add hybrid input system allowing students to select exam topics from their registered course lessons instead of only manual text entry. Features: (1) 'Select from Course' toggle alongside existing free-text input, (2) display course syllabus with chapters/lessons, (3) auto-add selected lessons to material list, (4) navigation links to lesson pages, (5) dynamic content mapping via lesson IDs rather than labels.
questions: How should lessons be displayed in the selection UI - as a flat list, grouped by chapter, or with a tree/accordion structure?
Should lesson video players (if available) also be linkable from the study plan navigation, or only the lesson page?
What should happen if a lesson is renamed or deleted by an instructor - should the study plan keep the old label, show 'Lesson no longer available', or auto-update to the new title?
